title: cleomella jaliscensis
intro: Cleomella jaliscensis, also known as Mexican spiderflower or Cleomella, is a species of flowering plant in the borage family. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects. The plant is said to provide health benefits such as reducing fever, relieving pain and inflammation, and supporting the immune system. The herbal preparations of Cleomella jaliscensis typically involve infusions or decoctions of the leaves and flowers, which can be used to treat various health conditions.
